dialogos.texto_en: (Today is really the last day of the trip...)
Good morning.
Hey, good morning!
It seems like the weather's gonna be good\ntoday too.
Ah, we've been lucky with good weather\nthroughout the trip.\nI guess it's the result of our good karma!
Are you talking about your own karma?\nYou're quite confident in an odd way, my goodness.
You seemed pretty tired last night...\nBut I'm glad you slept well.
Yeah!\nI made sure to recover my energy for today.
We all got a lot of exercise yesterday.\nBut at least it helped us sleep well.
Sorry for causing you trouble yesterday,\nUesugi-kun.
We have to be careful not to have a situation\nlike yesterday again.
Don't worry about it.\nBesides, we're not going sightseeing today.\nIt's not like we'll be walking around like yesterday.
Huh?
Isn't today about going to the beach\nand having a barbecue?\nIt's a group activity, but we won't be walking around.
Well, I hope so.
There's no use worrying about it now, right?
Besides, if we come to Okinawa\nand don't play in the sea,\nit would be such a waste.
Heheh, that's true.
That's right!\nLet's have fun today, all six of us!
Okay.
It kinda feels like Uesugi-san\nis back to his usual self.
This feeling is somewhat nostalgic.
What's going on?\nHe seems to have let something go.
It doesn't seem like he's burnt out, though.
Maybe something happened?\nWell, as long as he seems to be having fun,\nthat's all that matters.
Heeey? What are you guys doing?\nThe Okinawa sea is waiting for us!
Ah, Sorry!
Come on, let's get going.
Okay!
